message.content:
@startuml
participant "s:ObjectStructure" as s #white;black;text:black
participant "a:CroncreteElementA" as a #white;black;text:black
participant "b:CroncreteElementB" as b #white;black;text:black
participant "v1:ConcreteVisitor1" as v1 #white;black;text:black

activate s
s -> a : accept(v1)
activate a
a -> v1 : visit(this)
activate v1
return operationA() 
deactivate v1
deactivate a
deactivate s 

s->b  :accept(v1)
 activate b  
   b --> v1    :visit(this)   
     return do nothing    
 deactivate b     
@enduml
